info.name: Stables-HT-ISS-time-daily-1-fix1
info.description:
ISSUER PERSPECTIVE: Hybrid Treasury Multi-Contract Behavioral Simulation

6 BEHAVIORAL MODELS x 31 DAILY EPOCHS = 186 PP EVENTS on liability contract

MODELS (all existing in risksrv3, zero code changes):
  BackingRatioModel (6.1)         — reserves/supply >= 100%, cash/reserves >= 20%
  ComplianceDriftModel (6.6)      — 4-metric weighted: backing(40%) + WAM(30%) + HQLA(20%) + attestation(10%)
  AssetQualityModel (6.4)         — HQLA degradation under bank/sovereign stress
  MaturityLadderModel (6.3)       — T-bill roll decisions: NORMAL/SHORTEN/CASH/EMERGENCY
  ConcentrationDriftModel (6.5)   — HHI across 5 asset buckets
  ContinuousAttestationModel (6.8)— aggregates 6 risk signals into composite attestation score

20 REFERENCE INDEXES feed the 6 models at every daily epoch.

6 PAM CONTRACTS:
  Cash Reserve:    $5,000   (initial liquidity)
  T-Bill 4-Week:   $25,000  (matures Mar 15)
  T-Bill 8-Week:   $25,000  (matures Mar 30)
  T-Bill 13-Week:  $25,000  (matures Apr 15)
  T-Bill 26-Week:  $23,000  (matures Jun 15)
  Liability:       $100,000 (stablecoin supply, all 6 models attached)

REGULATORY BASIS:
  STABLE Act: backing >= 100%
  GENIUS Act: backing >= 100%, WAM <= 93 days, HQLA composition
  MiCA EMT:  backing >= 100%, 30-day attestation cycle

CONFIRMED: Zero code changes. Collection JSON only. All endpoints pre-exist.

Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C) before running.

exec: console.log('✅ ISS_WAM_DAYS_01: 45d→96d peak (>93d GENIUS limit)→36d recovery');
console.log('✅ ISS_BUCKET_CASH_01: Cash bucket for HHI');
console.log('✅ ISS_BACKING_RISK_01: Pre-computed backing risk signal for ContinuousAttestation');
console.log('✅ ISS_LIQ_RISK_01: Pre-computed liquidity risk for ContinuousAttestation');
console.log('✅ ISS_QUALITY_RISK_01: Pre-computed quality risk for ContinuousAttestation');
console.log('✅ ISS_CONC_RISK_01: Pre-computed concentration risk for ContinuousAttestation');
console.log('✅ ISS_COMP_RISK_01: Pre-computed compliance risk for ContinuousAttestation');
console.log('✅ ISS_EW_RISK_01: EW risk placeholder (issuer perspective)');
console.log('   Weights: backing=40%, WAM=30%, HQLA=20%, attestation=10%');
console.log('   Aggregates 6 risk signals → composite attestation score');

item.name: 5.1 Run ISS Simulation (6 contracts, 31 daily epochs, 6 models)

exec: console.log('ISSUER PERSPECTIVE: 6 MODELS x 31 DAYS = 186 PP EVENTS');
if(pps.length>10) console.log('    ... and '+(pps.length-10)+' more PP events');
